text: Lakers' Doncic (hamstring) to miss at least rest of regular season - ESPN
fullText: Lakers star Luka Doncic has a Grade 2 hamstring strain and will be out at least through the end of the regular season, the team announced Friday.

text: Trump budget seeks $1.5 trillion in defense spending alongside domestic program cuts - NPR

text: Artemis II Astronaut Christina Koch Proclaims Herself 'Space Plumber' - OutKick
fullText: Artemis II astronaut Christina Koch fixes a malfunctioning Orion capsule toilet mid-mission, earning “space plumber" status and saving the crew from a worst-case scenario in orbit.

text: US Bonds Fall as Strong Jobs Data Undermines Fed Cut Outlook - Bloomberg.com
fullText: Bond traders ended the week betting that the Federal Reserve will keep interest rates steady this year, on signs of a stabilizing US labor market and uncertainty about the economic impact of war in the Middle East.

text: White House again proposes steep NASA budget cuts - SpaceNews
